scripts.dev: set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set ASTRO_DEV_TOOLBAR=false&& astro dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4324
scripts.start: set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& set ASTRO_DEV_TOOLBAR=false&& astro dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4324
scripts.build: set ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1&& astro build && pagefind --site dist
